notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Brooks Lee. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Nick Gonzales to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum reaches on a fielder's choice out, first baseman Kody Clemens to catcher Victor Caratini. Oneil Cruz out at home. Konnor Griffin to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds homers (6) on a fly ball to left field. Tyler Callihan scores.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Brooks Lee. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Nick Gonzales to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Nick Gonzales singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Brooks Lee. Brandon Lowe scores. Bryan Reynolds to 3rd. Nick Gonzales to 2nd. Throwing error by third baseman Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Byron Buxton GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Gonzales to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Tristan Gray out at 2nd. Byron Buxton out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Byron Buxton rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Gonzales to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Tristan Gray out at 2nd. Byron Buxton out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin reaches on a fielder's choice. Oneil Cruz to 3rd. Oneil Cruz advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop Tristan Gray.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Kreidler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Kreidler grounds out, pitcher Gregory Soto to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds homers (6) on a fly ball to left field. Tyler Callihan scores.
